title: Junior Java Developer
description: Brightwave builds project management software for construction firms. We're growing our engineering team and looking for a Junior Java Developer who is eager to learn. You'll be mentored by senior engineers, contribute to real features from day one, and grow your skills in a supportive environment.
responsibilities: Build and fix features under guidance of senior developers
Write unit tests for your code
Participate in code reviews and team ceremonies
Learn our tech stack and domain over the first 3 months
